title: Bengasi
writer: Edoardo Anton, Ugo Betti, Alessandro De Stefani
actors: Fosco Giachetti, Mária Tasnádi Fekete, Amedeo Nazzari
plot: The fate of several men in a Libyan city briefly captured from Italy by the invading British in 1941, includes a focus on the role of women during these hard times.
